alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Safety Compliance
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Compliance with the Food Safety Basic Law is mandatory for all food products.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Sanitation Compliance
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Compliance with the Food Sanitation Law is mandatory for all food products.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East (GCC/GSO) Allergen List - Declaration of allergens in prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Specific allergen declaration requirements, including lists and formatting, must be verified against the full GSO 9:2022 technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Class II chemical preservatives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Within prescribed regulatory limits. Can only be directly added to fillings and toppings in kuehs.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid, benzoic acid)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not to be directly added during manufacturing.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification Required. New: Must comply with regulatory limits. Applies to all food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Unpermitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Within SFA's regulatory limits. New: Must comply with regulatory limits. Applies to all food businesses.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Diethylstibestrol, Hexoestrol, Dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations prohibits import or sale of meat and any food derived from meat containing these residues.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish, sulphite
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Sulphite >= 10. These 11 allergens require mandatory labeling if present as an ingredient or food additive. Sulphite requires labeling if residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. Verification required for specific list.. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale exists and must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Delisted color additives are in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use in food. Verification required against FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).. New: Prohibited from use. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.. These are the nine major food allergens recognized by U.S. law (FALCPA and FASTER Act).

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Facilities must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling.. Established by the "Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food" rule (CGMP & PC rule, 21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label.. Identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be specifically labeled with the name of the allergen source.. The name of the food source must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after/next to the ingredient list in a 'contains' statement.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels.. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-free claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet a defined standard for gluten content.. The FDA issued a final rule defining “gluten-free” for food labeling.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specificity for Tree Nuts, Fish, and Crustacean Shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: The type of tree nut, and the species of fish and Crustacean shellfish must be declared.. Examples: almonds, pecans, walnuts for tree nuts; bass, flounder, cod for fish; crab, lobster, shrimp for Crustacean shellfish.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 total sulfites. Due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals (e.g., asthma).

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. New: Check official source. Verification of permitted food additives and their conditions of use is required via the Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) Online Database, which is regularly updated.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of maximum levels (MLs) or guideline levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants is required via the Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and related Codex texts.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex standards and CCCF decisions. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: Old: Adherence to Code of Practice for Prevention and Reduction. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification required via Union list of food additives in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008. The database serves as a tool to inform about approved food additives and their conditions of use in the EU.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. This regulation lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Export Certificate Procedures
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines the procedures for issuing export certificates for processed foods. Compliance with relevant food safety and quality standards, which may include labelling, is typically a prerequisite for such certificates. The full document must be consulted for detailed procedures.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categorization
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation defines food categories, which is essential for determining the applicability of other specific regulations regarding additives, contaminants, and labelling for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products. The full document must be consulted for detailed categories.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Oversight of Online Distributed Food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation covers the oversight of drugs and food distributed online. It likely includes provisions for ensuring that information provided for online sales of processed foods, including labelling details, is accurate and compliant. The full document must be consulted for specific requirements.
